creator: exploringlondon
caption:
Sandy beaches at low tide, dramatic white cliffs and rocks that you can walk between, rock pools and caves to explore that only appear at low tide… this is the perfect day trip from London, only 2 hours from London Victoria!

📍 Botany Bay, Kent
🌊 Visit at low tide (check the times on the Met Office website)
🚗 If you drive down, there’s not much parking right by the beach but you can find space near Botany Bay Hotel, Kingsgate Avenue, Fitzroy Avenue and Botany Road, as well as further down on Palm Bay Avenue 
🚝 If you’re taking the train, go from London Victoria to Broadstairs station and then take a bus (Loop) to Friends Corner and then walk
✨ Margate Beach is also nearby and a great stop if you’re looking for a seaside town with great cafes and restaurants too!

transcription.text: Fun day trips from London part 5 and this time we're taking you to one of the best beaches in the UK that's only around two hours away from London, Victoria. Here you'll find dramatic white cliffs that you can walk between at low tide as well as sand and rock pools. You'll also find caves that you can only go into when it's low tide and the views are absolutely magical especially at sunset. This is Botany Bay in Kent. Find all the details you need on how to get there in the caption and share this with someone who would love to go this summer.
